task: Advanced high-economic-value task: Rare Variant Burden Mask Construction Review. Context: an expert reviewer must convert noisy operational evidence into a defensible action plan for a constrained engineering window for rare variant burden mask construction review in the computational biology domain. Embedded packet: records: R1 allele_frequency=0.003 cadd=10.94 call_rate=0.956 mask_include=0; R2 allele_frequency=0 cadd=16.07 call_rate=0.965 mask_include=1; R3 allele_frequency=0.002 cadd=34.65 call_rate=0.983 mask_include=0; R4 allele_frequency=0.002 cadd=17.61 call_rate=0.949 mask_include=1; normalized_threshold_score=87.5; remediation_budget_usd=60000; options: O1 targets the allele_frequency driver and reduces normalized risk contribution by 12% cost=18600, O2 targets the cadd driver and reduces normalized risk contribution by 18% cost=28200, O3 targets the mask_include margin driver and improves normalized margin by 9% cost=32400; source_excerpt="postmortem style evidence must connect metrics to operational action". Rules and constraints: classification must follow the named thresholds exactly; missing values cannot be imputed and outside assumptions are prohibited; remediation options may be combined only if total cost<=remediation_budget_usd; expert-review flag is required when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift; all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: calculate all derived fields, classify each record, rank the governing risks, and recommend the smallest sufficient action. Deliver burden_mask_definition.tsv + analysis_plan.md with formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes where relevant, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs, substitute outside data, or hide uncertainty; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
